title: sida micrantha
intro: Sida micrantha, also known as the Small-leaf Sida or Sida weed, is a plant species in the Malvaceae family, native to tropical regions of Asia and Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sida micrantha include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. Sida micrantha can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, infusions, and decoctions, and its leaves are also used in traditional folk medicine to treat a range of ailments.
